# jamfprotect_roles (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of all roles in Jamf Protect.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all roles in Jamf Protect.
data "jamfprotect_roles" "all" {}

# Output the role names.
output "role_names" {
  value = [for role in data.jamfprotect_roles.all.roles : role.name]
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `roles` (Attributes List) The list of roles. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--roles))

<a id="nestedatt--roles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `roles`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the role.
- `name` (String) The name of the role.
- `read_permissions` (List of String) Read permissions assigned to the role.
- `updated` (String) The last-updated timestamp.
- `write_permissions` (List of String) Write permissions assigned to the role.
